title.en: With his strength, he is enough to protect the ...

content.en:
Ye Tian didn't know that some of the Divine Heaven Realm Domain Ancestors were crossing the Dark Forbidden Domain to come here, and there were many top Domain Ancestors among them.

Of course, Ye Tian could also guess that one day in the future, a group of domain ancestors such as the Haohai Sea Ancestor would come to the Daoshan Realm, but he didn't worry about anything.

With his strength, he is enough to protect the human race.

Besides, it was not so simple to cross the Dark Forbidden Domain, and if it was that simple, there would not be so many Domain Ancestors who would not dare to step into the Dark Forbidden Domain casually.

Among them, no one knows what will happen, even if it is a domain ancestor, if he is not careful, he will fall into the dark forbidden realm.

The fragments of the vast sea realm can reach the Daoshan realm, it is luck, and perhaps it also has the blessing effect of the mysterious treasure, and the ordinary domain ancestor crossing the dark forbidden realm, if he is lucky, he will be fine, and if he is unlucky, he will be killed directly.

Moreover, the Dao Mountain Realm is not close to the Divine Heaven Realm, and those domain ancestors come across the Dark Forbidden Domain, I am afraid that it will take a long time, and tens of millions of years is the minimum.

Therefore, Ye Tian didn't need to think about the matter of the Divine Heaven Realm Domain Ancestor in a short period of time.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the battle platform of the Battle Realm Tower again.

On the countless battle platforms, a half-step domain ancestor was fighting here.

Ye Tian's arrival attracted the attention of many half-step domain ancestors.

Now, Ye Tian has joined the Battle Gate, which is already a well-known thing, and everyone knows that Ye Tian has become the Holy Son of the Battle Gate.

"I've seen the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"I've seen the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

"I've seen the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

Many half-step domain ancestors greeted Ye Tian, but there were also people who disdained it, after all, they and Ye Tian were not from the same force, there was no need to say hello to Ye Tian, and there were even people who were jealous of Ye Tian, seeing that Ye Tian was unhappy, and they would not say hello.

Ye Tian hadn't come to the Dou Zhan Tai for a long time, and now he was already a half-step domain ancestor in the Guiyi Realm, so he wanted to come here to challenge and enter the Guiyi Ranking.

The gold content of the Unified List is much higher than that of the Unified List, because many geniuses have stayed on the Unified List for a short time, but they have stayed on the Unified List for a long time, so the Unified List has gathered a generation of geniuses on the Unified List.

There are many geniuses on the list of all things who have been promoted to the level of the Unified Realm in the future, but they may not be able to enter the Unified List from beginning to end.

Therefore, the gold content of the unified list is far from being comparable to the list of all things.

The geniuses who can really enter the Unified List are all the top geniuses of the Dark Sacred Realm, and most of them have entered the top ten or dozens of the Everything List.

Any Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor wants to enter the Unified Realm Ranking, which is also a huge honor.

Ye Tian communicated with the Black Tower Imprint, and selected an Eightfold Return to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor to challenge.

Before, Ye Tian had shown the combat power of the Sevenfold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and now it was the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, many Half-Step Domain Ancestors thought that Ye Tian was at most the combat power of the Eightfold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, after all, how could the strength be so fast!

But some people also think that Ye Tian has joined the battle gate, and his strength improvement is definitely not slow, and he may already have the combat power of the Ninefold Return to One Realm and a half-step domain ancestor.

Therefore, not all of the Eightfold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors dared to compete with Ye Tian.

"Refused!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Obviously, the man seemed to be afraid of him, so he did not dare to accept the challenge.

So, Ye Tian chose a top eightfold return realm half-step domain ancestor with a relatively high win rate.

This time, the other party agreed.

On the fighting platform.

Ye Tian came to power, and Ye Tian's opponent Feng Qi Daozu also came on the field.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, I don't believe that your strength has reached the Ninefold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, this battle, the one who wins must be me!"

Feng Qi Dao Ancestor said with a smile.

"Let's shoot!"

Ye Tian was too lazy to talk nonsense.

Rumble!!!!!

The battle is on!

Ye Tian also opened the Mixed Yuan Holy Body, and preserved his strength, deliberately suppressed the half-step domain ancestor level of the top eightfold return to one realm, and it was difficult to solve the battle with the Fengqi Dao Ancestor, and after a long time, he defeated the Fengqi Dao Ancestor by a slight advantage and won a lot of points.

As a result, many Returning Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors whose strength was above Fengqi Dao Ancestor actually challenged Ye Tian.

Ye Tian took them all, and then won them one by one by a narrow margin, earning a lot of points.

"The Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws hides his strength, he must have the strength of the Ninefold Return to One Realm and a half-step domain ancestor!"

Someone debunked.

In fact, at this time, most people could see that Ye Tian was clumsy, and every time he deliberately won the victory by a slight advantage.

This kind of is really a bit shameless, cheating them of their points.

But there is no way, hiding his strength is also Ye Tian's business, and others can't care about it.

"Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, I will challenge you, do you dare?"

A Nine-fold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestral Dao.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

This Ninefold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor is the Thunder Shock Dao Ancestor, and he is not weak among the Ninefold Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, and he belongs to the upper middle level.

For this battle, many people are curious.

As a result, after the first battle, Lei Zhen Daozu was defeated!

At this moment, everyone was shocked!

At the beginning, Ye Tian was only a seven-fold one-realm half-step domain ancestor combat power, but now in a short period of time, he has been promoted to a nine-fold one-realm half-step domain ancestor combat power, such an improvement speed is too fast.

Next, there were still Ninefold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestors accepting Ye Tian's challenge, but whether it was the top Ninefold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, or the more powerful Ninefold Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, they all lost one by one.

"Could it be that the combat power of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor has surpassed the Ninefold One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor?"

Someone speculated.

You must know that in the Dark Sacred Domain, some of the weaker new domain ancestors are just the combat power of the half-step domain ancestors of the Nine Realms and the One Realm!

Transcending the Ninefold Realm and Returning to One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, he is called the Overlimiter in the Dark Sanctuary Realm!

This kind of genius belongs to the existence of breaking the limit, and can leapfrog to kill the domain ancestor!

For example, the half-step domain ancestors of the Unified Realm on the Unified Realm are all overlimiters, and they are not ordinary overlimiters.

Overcaps are divided into one double overlimiter, and two overruns, and as for triple overruns, they are legends and almost non-existent.

The so-called triple overlimiter is to kill a top domain ancestor by skipping the level, even if he kills a weaker top domain ancestor, it is considered an overlimiter!

The overrunners on the one list are basically the top one-tier over-limiters, and the top 100 on the one-tier list are all double-overruns.

In other words, the top 100 geniuses on the list are all the combat power of the Elite Domain Ancestor who has crossed the level to kill the Elite Domain Ancestor, which can refer to the Elite Domain Ancestor of the Dark Sacred Domain, if it is to kill the Elite Domain Ancestor of the Realm Domain, it will be easier.

Ye Tian is an overlimiter, this is an undoubted thing!

At this time, many half-step domain ancestors were very curious about whether Ye Tian had the ability to enter the list now!
